nasb.text: Now the name of his firstborn was Joel, and the name of his second, Abijah; they were judging in Beersheba.

esv.text: The name of his firstborn son was Joel, and the name of his second, Abijah; they were judges in Beersheba.

cnv.text: 他的長子名叫約珥，次子名叫亞比亞，都在別是巴作士師。

ccb.text: 他的长子是约珥，次子是亚比亚，他们在别示巴做士师。
